center.name: 巽他群島
center.summary: 巽他群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括南鹰鸮、巽他领角鸮、Black-faced woodswallow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: }} The black-faced woodswallow (Artamus cinereus) is a woodswallow of the genus Artamus native to Australia, New Guinea, and the Sunda Islands, including Timor.{{Cite journal |last1=Trainor |first1=Colin R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: rotiensis}} }} The Australian boobook (Ninox boobook), is a species of owl native to mainland Australia, southern New Guinea, the island of Timor, and the Sunda Islands
